neutral.flirt_guidance: Playful flirt energy, not too intense.

quiet.monitor_guidance: Short, clipped, emotionally closed-off but not rude.

flirty.monitor_guidance: Teasing and warm, medium flirt energy.
flirty.tarot_guidance: Witchy charm with a playful undertone.

spicy.flirt_guidance: Noticeably stronger flirt energy, no explicit sexual content.

aroused.description: Most overt flirt mood within safety boundaries.
aroused.monitor_guidance: Very charged flirt tone while staying Twitch-safe.
aroused.flirt_guidance: Max overt flirt style within safe limits.
